justification: The issue title and body clearly indicate a bug in the `Series.combine_first` method when dealing with Timestamps.
current_state_summary: The issue has been closed, but the problem still exists in newer versions of pandas. Related issues suggest ongoing similar problems.

related_issues.title: Working with arrays inside cells - mean() works, median() crashes
BUG: Series mode crashes when there is more than one mode
BUG: inconsistent behavior and crash in `DataFrame.__setitem__` when >=3d ndarray is used
